title: Add Chroma AI wallpaper app to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: New wallpaper dropped
gist.blurb: Chroma AI just landed in the community showcase. It's a React Native app that turns your prompts into wallpapers, because default backgrounds are for cowards.
gist.summary: Added the Chroma AI wallpaper app to the community showcase.
gist.impact: The community directory now features Chroma, a React Native app for generating custom wallpapers via natural language.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a wallpaper app called 'Chroma'. Wallpapers represent screens, colors, and customization. The bee (Polly) can be depicted as an artist painting a colorful wallpaper on a giant retro smartphone screen.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting a vibrant landscape wallpaper on a giant retro smartphone screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, painting a vibrant landscape wallpaper on a giant retro smartphone screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
